summary:
Step 3 'Primary CTA 'Get Started' is visible.' failed. Error: TEST BLOCKED: Task: Verify the homepage loads with hero, features, demo, pricing, and footer sections.

Requirement checklist and observed evidence:
- Hero headline text: Verified. The page contains the headline "Your intelligent operating system for life" (observed in page content and browser_state). 
- 'asheeighe' logo text: Verified. The site name "asheeighe" is visible in the header and footer. 
- Primary CTA button: Verified. A primary CTA labeled "Get Started" is visible on the page (observed in interactive elements and screenshot).
- Features section: Verified. A "Features" link is present in the navigation and Features content was observed.
- Demo section / label: Verified. "AI Chat" (AI Chat Demo label) is present in nav/page content.
- Pricing link: Verified. "Pricing" is present in the top navigation.
- Footer section: Verified. After scrolling to the bottom, the footer is visible and contains site name, navigation links (Features, Pricing, GitHub, API) and attribution "Built with ♥ by Halima Hafir".

Result: All requested sections and elements are present and visible on the homepage. No missing features were found. The task is complete.
